_comment: schema: id (string), title (string), description (string), objective { kind: 'catch'|'talk', target (string - fish name or npc id), count (int, defaults 1) }, reward { valu (u64) }. quests auto-start. on completion, valu is granted and the quest is marked done.

title: First Cast
description: Catch any common carp. They're forgiving.

title: Fill the Basket
description: Catch three bluegill for the inn's cook.
